info.title: Website API
info.description:
Simple REST API to retrieve and manage contacts, form messages, store
products, orders, bookings, subscriber lists and webhooks.

## Authentication

The API uses **[Bearer Token Authorization](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6750)**.

1. View your API key in your website > **Website Settings** > **Applications** > **API Key**.
2. Pass it on every request via the `Authorization` header: `Authorization: Bearer <API KEY>`.
3. All API requests must be made over HTTPS.
4. All API clients must include a `User-Agent` header identifying themselves, e.g. `MyApp/1.0.1`.

## Errors

The API uses conventional HTTP response codes. Codes in the **2xx** range
indicate success; **4xx** codes indicate a request error (e.g. a required
parameter was omitted or a resource was missing); **5xx** codes indicate a
server error or an unprocessable entry. Every error includes a
human-readable message, e.g. `{ "success": false, "message": "Error message..." }`.

## Pagination

Most endpoints returning lists support pagination via the `limit`
(1–50, default 30) and `skip` (a.k.a. offset, default 0) query
parameters. Paginated responses share a common envelope of `items`,
`totalCount`, `limit` and `skip`.

domain.description: Your website's domain or system domain

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Contacts are all visitors identified by their email in your website.

tags.name: Members
tags.description: Members are registered users in your website.

tags.name: Member groups
tags.description: Member groups are groups which the members belong to. Access to resources can be restricted to specific member groups only.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Products are individual items, services or memberships for sale in your store.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Access orders made in your website.

tags.name: Forms
tags.description: Access all form submissions in the website.

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Access the details of all scheduled events via the booking features of each website or funnel.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhooks push automated notifications to your destination URL when important events occur in your website.

get.description: Get a paginated list of all contacts created in your website. Optionally filter by created date.

parameters.name: created_at_min
parameters.description: List only contacts created after the specified timestamp (inclusive, in seconds since the Unix epoch).

parameters.name: created_at_max
parameters.description: List only contacts created before the specified timestamp (inclusive, in seconds since the Unix epoch).

post.description: Create a contact. If a contact with the supplied email already exists, it will be updated. Only supplied parameters are set.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the contact.

put.description: Update a single contact. Only non-empty fields are set.

delete.description: Deletes the contact and all data associated with it.

get.description: Get a paginated list of all members in your website. Optionally filter by group id.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: List only members in the specified group.

post.description:
Create a new member. If a password is provided, the member is created
with that password. Otherwise the member is created with a random
password and a password-reset email is sent to the member.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the member.

put.description: Update a single member. Only non-empty fields are set. The member password will NOT be updated.

post.description:
If you already have your own authentication mechanism, Single Sign-On
allows your authenticated members to directly access the member area
without logging in again.

Call this endpoint from your backend and redirect the member to the
`accessUrl` from the response. Optionally pass `path` to direct the
member to a specific page. The `accessUrl` is valid for 15 minutes.

200.description: A session token and access URL.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the member group.

get.description: Get a paginated list of all products in your website. Optionally filter by category or product name.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: List only products in the specified category (includes all products in the subcategories, if any).

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: List only products containing the specified string in their title.

post.description: Create a product. Set `update_existing_product_by_url` to `true` to find an existing product with the same URL and update it instead.

parameters.name: update_existing_product_by_url
parameters.description: If true and a product with the same URL exists, the existing product is updated instead.

get.description: Get a list of all categories in the store.

parameters.name: parent
parameters.description: List only direct sub-categories of the provided parent.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the product.

put.description: Update a single product. Only non-empty fields or provided variants are set.

get.description: Get a paginated list of all orders created in your website. Optionally filter by created date.

parameters.name: created_at_min
parameters.description: List only orders created after the specified timestamp (inclusive, in seconds since the Unix epoch).

parameters.name: created_at_max
parameters.description: List only orders created before the specified timestamp (inclusive, in seconds since the Unix epoch).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the order.

put.description:
Update a single order's details. Only non-empty fields are set.
Available order statuses are `PENDING`, `SHIPPED`, `COMPLETED`,
`CANCELED` and `ARCHIVED`.

If the order has digital downloads or membership products and the
status is set to `COMPLETED`, the customer receives an email with
access to their digital content.

get.description: Get a paginated list of all form submissions in the website.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: List only form submissions created after the specified timestamp (inclusive, in seconds since the Unix epoch).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: List only form submissions created before the specified timestamp (inclusive, in seconds since the Unix epoch).

200.description: A paginated list of form submissions.

get.description: Get a paginated list of booked sessions in the website / funnel.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: List only bookings starting after the specified timestamp (inclusive, in seconds since the Unix epoch).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: List only bookings starting before the specified timestamp (inclusive, in seconds since the Unix epoch).

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: List only bookings with the selected event id.

post.description: Create a subscriber list for email marketing purposes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the subscriber list.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the webhook.

post.description: Fired when a new order is placed on the website.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Fired when an order is updated.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Fired when a new product is created.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Fired when a product is updated.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Fired when a form is submitted.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Fired when a new contact is created or an existing contact is updated.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Fired when a new booking is created.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

bearerAuth.description: Pass your API key as: `Authorization: Bearer <API KEY>`.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Between 1 and 50.

Skip.name: skip
Skip.description: The number of items to skip (offset). Defaults to 0, i.e. the first page.

EmailQuery.name: email
EmailQuery.description: The email address to look for.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

PaginationMeta.description: Common pagination envelope shared by list endpoints.

totalCount.description: The total size of the result set without any pagination.

skip.description: The current offset in the list.

ContactProperty.description: A custom contact property as defined in the CRM section of your website.

createdOn.description: Timestamp in Unix seconds since epoch.

properties.description: Array of custom properties, as defined in the CRM section of your website.

tags.description: List of tags assigned to the contact.

memberId.description: Member id if assigned to contact.

subscribed.description: Whether the contact is a subscriber (for email marketing).

subscriberLists.description: Array of subscriber list IDs (email marketing lists).

groups.description: Member group id(s) to which the member belongs.

registeredOn.description: Timestamp in Unix seconds since epoch.

password.description: Optional. If omitted, a random password is set and a reset email is sent. Ignored on update.

path.description: Optional. Direct the member to a specific page after sign-on.

accessUrl.description: Redirect the member here. Valid for 15 minutes.

link.description: Optional default page where members are redirected after a successful login.

url.description: The category URL (handle) in your store.

parentCategory.description: Parent category ID. 0 (or null) if this is the root category.

name.description: The name of the option (e.g. Color, Size, Material).

values.description: List of all possible values for this option.

advanced.description: Whether different variations of this option have their own price, quantity, SKU or weight.

options.description: List of strings identifying this variant by its advanced options, e.g. ["Wood", "Single"]. Empty when there are no advanced options.

regularPrice.description: The regular price, if on sale.

Subscription.description: Subscription details for a subscription product.

cycles.description: Number of payment cycles. 0 for ongoing payments.

url.description: The product URL (handle) in your store.

hidden.description: Whether the product is hidden in your store front.

file.description: Digital products only - URL of the digital file being sold.

appliedToItems.description: Zero-based indices of the order's line items the tax applies to.

shippingRequired.description: Whether this item is a physical product requiring shipping.

variation.description: Name/value pairs describing the selected variant.

additions.description: Name/value pairs of any extra information asked for this item.

invoiceNo.description: Invoice number assigned to the order.

created.description: Timestamp in Unix seconds since epoch (time placed).

contactId.description: Unique identifier of the contact that made the order.

memberId.description: Unique identifier of the registered member that made the order (if any).

shippingRequired.description: Whether the order contains physical products requiring shipping.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used to place the order.

transactionId.description: If paid, the payment transaction id.

status.description: Order status. Returned in lowercase; see the Update operation for the accepted uppercase input values.

tags.description: List of tags assigned to the order.

additionalFields.description: Field/value pairs of all additional fields collected with the order.

notes.description: Private notes added to this order (time/value pairs).

courier.description: The name of the courier service to set.

transactionId.description: The transaction id uniquely identifying the payment for this order.

notifyCustomer.description: Whether to notify the customer of this change.

name.description: The name of the submitted form.

received.description: Timestamp in Unix seconds since epoch (time submitted).

fields.description: Name/value pairs of all submitted fields.

start.description: Timestamp in Unix seconds since epoch (booking start).

end.description: Timestamp in Unix seconds since epoch (booking end).

formAnswers.description: Name/value pairs of all form questions answered by the attendee.

created.description: Timestamp in Unix seconds since epoch.

subscribers.description: Total number of subscribers in this list.

target.description: Your destination URL to push notifications to.

secret.description: Use the secret to verify that events posted to your URL were sent by the website.

WebsiteRef.description: Information about the website where the event originated.

FormSubmissionWebhook.description: POST payload delivered for the `form_submitted` event.

formValues.description: Field/value pairs of all submitted fields.
